minimum_claim: Flower size changes at the first regime transition and may continue to decline after effective Bombus loss.
prohibited_claim: Flower size alone identifies a second threshold or historical pollinator replacement.
falsifier: No reproducible first-transition decrease under the locked source values.

minimum_claim: The large-Bombus to ardens contrast is small at the declared tolerance, whereas the pooled no-Bombus regime has lower outcrossing; decline may continue within no-Bombus islands.
prohibited_claim: Every outcrossing change is a discrete step or proves effective pollinator history.
falsifier: The second-regime contrast is not lower across admissible published interval endpoints.

minimum_claim: Bagged autonomous reproductive capacity shows the clearest Oshima-to-no-Bombus threshold in the current Campanula channels.
prohibited_claim: Bagged capacity is realized selfing rate or establishes adaptive benefit without fitness data.
falsifier: The Oshima-to-no-Bombus increase disappears under the locked source values.

minimum_claim: A validated observation model may test whether specialist visible signal weakens mainly after effective Bombus loss.
prohibited_claim: Current public photographs already establish nectar-guide loss or pollinator-mediated selection.
falsifier: A validated positive-control-sensitive observation model finds no specialist late decline or the same decline in negative controls.

minimum_claim: Open-generalist lineages are a falsification control and are not predicted to share the specialist late threshold.
prohibited_claim: Ajania alone represents all generalists or absence of a visual shift proves the staged mechanism.
falsifier: A replicated validated generalist cohort shows the same common late decline as specialist-like taxa.

minimum_claim: Measured climate can be compared as an adversary, but environment and island history remain first-class alternatives.
prohibited_claim: Regime contrasts alone support or contradict environment-only, or measured climate exhausts environmental explanations.
falsifier: An explicit predeclared environmental likelihood reproduces all locked channels and holdout patterns at equal or better predictive performance.
